---
pagetitle: "Blog | Mesfin Genie"
description: "Notes on health economics, choice modelling, behavioural science and research methods by Mesfin Genie."
image: /assets/og-card.png
page-layout: full
listing:
  id: posts
  contents: posts
  sort: "date desc"
  type: grid
  grid-columns: 3
  categories: true
  fields: [date, title, description, categories, reading-time]
  feed: true
---

```{=html}
<header class="page-header"><div class="page-shell"><p class="eyebrow">Blog</p><h1>Notes and commentary</h1><p>Short, practical pieces on health economics, discrete choice experiments, behavioural science and research methods. Occasional notes on tools and teaching.</p></div></header>
<div class="page-shell blog-listing">
```

:::{#posts}
:::

```{=html}
</div>
```
